report.summary: Researched tokenized stocks as a high-opportunity content gap, then built a 3,200-word learn guide and a live interactive tracker tool targeting the $1B on-chain equity milestone narrative.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified tokenized stocks as a clear content gap: /learn/tokenized-stocks-guide-2026 and /tools/tokenized-stocks-tracker did not exist in the codebase.
Tokenized equities crossed $1B on-chain in March 2026, driven by Ondo Finance (~58% share), Backed Finance, and Dinari.
Ondo Finance received regulatory approval from Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) on March 3, 2026, and has EU/EEA coverage — strong freshness angle.
Binance re-entered the tokenized stocks market via Ondo Finance partnership in February 2026.
DTC (Depository Trust Company) launched blockchain digital twins of US securities in Q1 2026 — institutional tailwind.

Key competitors covering this topic: CoinGecko (basic protocol listings), DefiLlama (TVL data only). Neither has a dedicated 2026 guide with protocol comparison, risk breakdown, and DeFi yield strategies.
Existing degen0x content: rwa-tokenization-guide-2026 and tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026 exist, but no dedicated tokenized equities page — strong internal linking opportunity.
Top DeFi narratives Q1 2026: OnFi/on-chain finance, Perp DEXs, Stablecoins/GENIUS Act, RWA tokenization, AI agents. Tokenized stocks sits at the RWA + institutional DeFi intersection.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Learn guide: 'Tokenized Stocks 2026: The Complete Guide to On-Chain Equities' (~3,200 words, 14 min read, Intermediate difficulty).

Sections covered: What Are Tokenized Stocks | How They Work On-Chain (5-step mechanism) | Top Protocols Comparison Table (Ondo, Backed, Dinari, Binance x Ondo) | How to Access (5-step guide) | Regulatory Landscape (US/EU/ADGM) | Risk Breakdown (5 risks rated High/Med/Low) | DeFi Yield Strategies (4 strategies) | 6-question FAQ.
Tool page: 'Tokenized Stocks Tracker' — React client component with sortable/filterable table of 10 tokenized assets (xAAPL, xTSLA, xSPY, xQQQ, xNVDA, xMSFT, xGOOGL, xDIA, xAMZN, xIWM).

Tool features: market summary cards, protocol filter, search bar, sortable columns (price/change/mcap/volume/APY), expandable detail panel with buy links, protocol market share breakdown with progress bars.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title (learn guide): 'Tokenized Stocks Guide 2026: Buy US Equities On-Chain 24/7' — primary keyword first, under 60 chars.
Title (tool): 'Tokenized Stocks Tracker — Live On-Chain Equity Data | degen0x'.
Target keywords: 'tokenized stocks', 'tokenized stocks guide 2026', 'buy stocks on-chain', 'Ondo Finance stocks', 'on-chain equities', 'tokenized stocks tracker'.
Article schema (JSON-LD) with title, description, datePublished, author, wordCount added to learn guide.
FAQ schema (6 questions) added to learn guide — targeting People Also Ask placements.
BreadcrumbList schema added to learn guide.
SoftwareApplication schema + FAQPage schema (4 questions) injected inline via dangerouslySetInnerHTML on tool page (client component pattern).
OG and Twitter card metadata set for both pages with distinct social copy.
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in src/lib/published-pages.ts under Day 27 group — indexed immediately.
Internal links: guide → /learn/rwa-tokenization-guide-2026, /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026, /tools/tokenized-stocks-tracker, /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026, /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026.
TypeScript check: 0 errors on all new files.
